data.title: Head of Revenue Analytics
data.jd_text:
The Apex Group was established in Bermuda in 2003 and is now one of the world’s largest fund administration and middle office solutions providers.

Our business is unique in its ability to reach globally, service locally and provide cross-jurisdictional services. With our clients at the heart of everything we do, our hard-working team has successfully delivered on an unprecedented growth and transformation journey, and we are now represented by over circa 13,000 employees across 112 offices worldwide.Your career with us should reflect your energy and passion.

That’s why, at Apex Group, we will do more than simply ‘empower’ you. We will work to supercharge your unique skills and experience.

Take the lead and we’ll give you the support you need to be at the top of your game. And we offer you the freedom to be a positive disrupter and turn big ideas into bold, industry-changing realities.

For our business, for clients, and for you

Head of Revenue Analytics

Role Purpose

The Head of Revenue Analytics is responsible for building, owning, and governing Apex Group’s global commercial analytics capability, ensuring trusted, actionable, and forward-looking insights drive revenue predictability and growth.

This role owns the revenue analytics layer across Salesforce and the enterprise data platform, while working in close partnership with Apex’s Global Analytics function and AI teams to integrate broader data sources, advanced analytics, and predictive insights into the commercial operating model.

The role requires a leader who is technically credible, commercially fluent, and able to bridge enterprise data strategy with frontline sales execution—ensuring analytics move from reporting to decisioning and action.

Key Responsibilities

 Revenue Analytics Ownership & ArchitectureOwn the end-to-end revenue analytics domain, including data models, metrics, dashboards, and insight delivery for Sales and CRM.Lead the design of scalable revenue data models across pipeline, forecasting, bookings, and performance.Own the semantic layer and metric definitions that power executive reporting and operational decision-making.Partner with IT and Data Engineering to ensure performance, security, and scalability of the revenue analytics stack. Partnership with Global Analytics FunctionAct as the commercial analytics lead interfacing with Apex’s global enterprise analytics team.Align revenue analytics requirements with enterprise data standards, tooling, and governance.Leverage central analytics capabilities (data science, advanced modeling, data engineering) while retaining clear ownership of revenue-specific outputs.Ensure consistency between enterprise-wide analytics initiatives and commercial reporting. Advanced & Predictive AnalyticsLead the evolution from descriptive and diagnostic reporting to predictive and prescriptive analytics.Develop models to forecast pipeline risk, deal slippage, win probability, and revenue confidence.Partner with AI and data science teams to:Embed predictive insights into Salesforce and commercial workflowsEnable next-best-action recommendations for Sales and CRMSurface risks and opportunities proactively, not reactivelyChampion experimentation and iterative improvement of analytical models. Data Integration & External Data EnablementDrive the integration of additional internal and third-party data sources, including:Market and industry dataClient and fund-level intelligenceBenchmarking and competitive insightsAlternative and external signals relevant to revenue generationEnsure third-party data is mapped, governed, and made actionable within commercial tools.Work with AI and product teams to operationalise insights rather than leaving them in dashboards. Analytics Build & Insight DeliveryLead the build of executive dashboards and scorecards for:Forecast accuracy and confidencePipeline health and conversionSales productivity and performanceRegional, product, and segment trendsEnsure insights are intuitive, timely, and aligned to commercial decision points.Support QBRs, MBRs, and board-level reporting with defensible, consistent analytics. Data Governance, Quality & TrustOwn revenue data governance, including definitions, standards, lineage, and documentation.Establish monitoring and controls for data quality, completeness, and integrity.Partner with Sales Ops, Deal Desk, and CRM to drive upstream data discipline.Serve as the escalation point for revenue data discrepancies across regions. Leadership & Capability DevelopmentBuild and lead a high-performing Revenue Analytics team.Set standards for analytical rigor, documentation, and technical excellence.Develop talent capable of operating confidently across data, AI, and commercial stakeholders.
Required Experience & Profile

Must-Have

10–15+ years in analytics, data, or revenue intelligence roles.Experience leading analytics in financial services, fund administration, fintech, or regulated B2B environments.Strong hands-on background in data model

data.title: Vice President, Digital Product and E-Commerce (Based in Hong Kong)
data.company: The Hongkong and Shanghai Hotels, Limited

data.title: Hands-on CTO (Full-Stack, AI)
data.jd_text:
Location: Fully remote (EMEA timezone)

Start date: ASAP

Language: Fluent English required

Industry: AI / Fintech / B2B SaaS Marketplace

About The Company

Pragmatike is recruiting on behalf of an early-stage startup building an AI-powered fundraising platform that connects startups, incubators, and investors. The platform leverages data and intelligent matching to help founders identify the right investors, secure warm introductions, and manage their fundraising process end-to-end. By combining AI-driven recommendations with workflow tools, the company aims to make fundraising faster, more efficient, and significantly more predictable. They are product-driven, fast-moving, and focused on building a scalable, high-impact platform from the ground up.

About The Role

We are looking for a hands-on CTO / Founding Engineer to lead the technical vision and execution of the platform. This is not a managerial-only position — it is a deeply technical, builder role. You will be directly responsible for designing, developing, and scaling the core product, including AI-driven matching systems, user workflows, and the underlying data platform. You will work closely with the founders and play a critical role in shaping both the technology roadmap and the product itself.

Key Responsibilities

Own the end-to-end architecture and technical strategy of the platformBuild and ship core product features across the full stackDesign and implement AI-powered matching and recommendation systemsDevelop user-facing features for startups, investors, and partnersDefine and optimize scoring, ranking, and data modelsMaintain and improve the existing product and infrastructureLead cloud infrastructure and DevOps (AWS), including deployments, scaling, and reliabilityEnsure performance, scalability, and security of the systemMake key decisions on tech stack, tooling, and system designCollaborate closely with founders on product direction and roadmapGradually build and mentor the engineering team as the company scales

Required Experience & Profile

3–5+ years of experience in software engineering (startup experience strongly preferred)Proven experience as:a CTO, Founding Engineer, ora senior full-stack / AI engineer in a scaling startupStrong full-stack development skills (frontend + backend)Solid experience building and integrating AI/ML-powered featuresHands-on experience with cloud infrastructure (AWS) and DevOps practicesAbility to build, ship, and maintain production systems independentlyStrong understanding of scalable system design and architectureExperience or interest in recommendation systems, matching algorithms, or data-driven productsComfortable working in a fast-paced, ambiguous startup environmentHigh ownership, autonomy, and product mindset

Nice to Have

Experience building marketplaces or two-sided platformsBackground in fintech, fundraising, or startup ecosystemsFamiliarity with recommendation systems or ranking algorithmsExperience with data pipelines and analytics-driven productsPrevious experience scaling a product from early-stage to growth

What we offer

Founding-level role with high impact on company directionFull ownership of the technical vision and product architectureOpportunity to build an AI-powered fundraising platform from scratchHighly autonomous, fast-moving environmentFully remote setup (EMEA) with flexible work style

﻿﻿Pragmatike is an Equal Opportunity Employer and is committed to providing equal employment opportunities to all applicants without discrimination. We recruit on behalf of our clients and prohibit discrimination and harassment based on race, color, religion, age, sex, national origin, disability status, genetics, protected veteran status, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, or any other characteristic protected by federal, state, or local laws. This policy applies to all terms and conditions of employment, including recruiting, hiring, placement, promotion, termination, layoff, recall, transfer, leaves of absence, compensation, and training.We are committed to a fair and inclusive hiring process. We process your personal data solely for recruitment purposes, in accordance with applicable privacy laws, and maintain reasonable safeguards to protect your information. Your data may be shared with our client(s) for hiring consideration, but will not be disclosed to third parties outside of the recruitment process.

data.title: Head of Faculty – Art & Design Technology – August 2026 start
data.jd_text:
About Us:

Fortes Education?has been a leading education provider in the UAE for over four decades with premium international schools and nurseries that have experienced outstanding success and growth. Our schools offer the most innovative and character-building education in the entire Middle East region.

Our core ethos and philosophy of education is Positive Education (PosEd). Through PosEd, our schools foster active engagement in learning,?celebrating character strengths and accomplishments. We encourage children to cultivate fulfilling relationships with others and seek meaning and purpose in their own lives.?We enable children to become happy learners and develop into innovative thinkers, confident young adults, and life-long learners. Our students develop resilience, a growth mindset and deep character strengths that allow them to flourish in an ever-changing world.?

About Sunmarke School –?Where Amazing Happens

Sunmarke School provides an ambitious and inspiring, values-based education that nurtures the hearts and minds of students so that they can flourish and achieve their dreams. Powered by our suite of signature programmes, Sunmarke is a uniquely innovative school, transforming young lives.?This was reflected in Sunmarke School winning the coveted ‘Most Innovative School’ award at the international Which School Advisor ceremony in Dubai and London.

Sunmarke is an all–through school which offers a premium education across a fantastic range of pathways for students, including the National Curriculum of England, GCSE/IGCSE,?‘A’?Levels, BTEC and the IB Diploma Programmes.??Our students regularly win examination boards’ ‘best in world’, ‘best in Middle East’ and ‘best in country’ awards every year, across a diverse range of subjects. The latest incredible IB results show that Sunmarke School is in the top 3 schools in Dubai and 69th in world rankings. Our suite of Signature Programmes is unrivalled in Dubai, with inspiring opportunities for students to experience transformative learning opportunities. These include Environmental and Sustainability Studies, where students learn in Forest School settings, as well as utilising cutting-edge hydroponic technology to examine how science can support sustainability in future terrains; a world-class STEAM centre and curriculum, which offers students an incredible opportunity to apply their learning in solving real-world problems, from Foundation Stage through to Year 9; Augmented and Virtual Reality AR/VR experiences alongside our cutting edge use of Artificial Intelligence for staff and students; outstanding performing arts opportunities with full black box and auditorium facilities alongside peripatetic music spaces and media suites; and a fantastic sports programme augmented with professional coaches, which led Sunmarke to be overall champions at the BSME Games.?

Sunmarke School has been judged by the Dubai School Inspection Bureau (DSIB) as a?‘Very Good’?school since our third?year of operation and is consistently judged ‘Outstanding’ by British?Schools Overseas (BSO).

We present an exciting opportunity to join our all through school and to play an important part in our journey beyond?“outstanding”. Sunmarke School, Dubai is one of our flagship schools, located at?a prime location in Jumeirah Village Triangle.?

data.title: Group Head of Security
data.jd_text:
Who are we?CFI Financial Group is an award-winning trading provider, possessing more than 25 years of experience with multiple offices around the world including London, Larnaca, Beirut, Amman, Dubai, Kuwait, Port Louis, and others.Check out more about CFI here.CFI is hiring! Make your mark in the online trading industry.Are you looking to pursue a career in finance? Do you want to work with a dynamic and growing team in the exciting world of online trading and investing? If you answered yes, then we have some amazing opportunities for you!
Description:We’re seeking a Head of Security to lead and develop our cybersecurity function as an independent structure reporting directly to the CEO. This role requires a unique blend of offensive security expertise, hands-on engineering background, and the ability to implement pragmatic security controls that guard rather than block business velocity. You’ll work closely with the CTO and technology teams to build security into our delivery pipeline while preparing the organization for regulatory compliance in financial services.
Key Responsibilities:
Build security frameworks based on ISO 27001, NIST CSF, CIS Controls, and SOC 2, Ensure compliance with DORA, EBA Guidelines, ISO 27001Implement information security governance structure, policies, and risk management processesEstablish and maintain security metrics, KPIs, and reporting for executive leadershipSecure Perimeter & Infrastructure Protection -Design and implement network segmentation and secure perimeter architectureCollaborate with development teams to establish secure SDLC practices: Integrate security into CI/CD pipelines with automated quality gates (SAST, DAST, SCA, container scanning, aplication security tools)Conduct penetration testing and API security assesments using Kali Linux, Metasploit, Burp Suite, and other offensive security toolsProvide hands-on remediation guidance that developers can implement
Requirements:Required Certifications (minimum 2):Offensive Security ( OSCP, OSCE, GPEN, or CEH), Security Management (CISSP or CISM),Cloud Security (CCSP, AWS Security Specialty, or Azure Security Engineer), Audit (CISA)8+ years in information security roles3+ years in security leadership positionsMandatory: Experience in regulated financial services (banking, brokerage, payments, fintech)Hands-on penetration testing and vulnerability assessment experienceDevelopment or DevOps background with practical coding experienceSuccessfully implemented DevSecOps practices and security automationExperience with regulatory audits and compliance assessmentsRequired Technical Skills:Offensive security tools: Kali Linux, Metasploit, Burp Suite, Nmap, Wireshark, SQLMapProgramming: Proficient in Python (prefferable) or atl least one other languageScripting: Mandatory proficiency in Bash, Zsh, and PowerShellPragmatic security mindset: Balance security with business enablementCollaborative leadership: Build trust with engineering teamsStrong communication: Translate security risks into business impact
Nice to Have:Experience with trading platforms, payment systems, or financial infrastructureKnowledge of AI/ML/LLM security considerationsFamiliarity with MT5, trading APIs, payment processing systems
Why join CFI?· We’re a fast-growing, multinational company· Competitive salaries and benefits· Work and learn with industry professions· Supportive and collaborative environment· Unlimited opportunities for growth and development

data.title: Director of Enrichment - August 2026
data.jd_text:
Job Description

With a 65-year legacy of excellence and a global reputation as one of the largest and most awarded private education providers, GEMS Education integrates cutting-edge advancements through its extensive networks and high-level partnerships. Join the GEMS School of Research and Innovation, where significant investments in AI, robotics, and state-of-the-art facilities drive exceptional student outcomes in academics and well-being. As a leader in educational innovation, we offer a forward-thinking environment focused on personalised learning, holistic development, and the opportunity to shape the future of education.

At GEMS School of Research and Innovation, we provide a seamless educational journey from Pre-Prep + Prep to Sixth Form, enhanced by cutting-edge technology and a forward-thinking curriculum. In the Pre-Prep + Prep stages, we prioritise personalized learning through gamification and advanced technologies, alongside a strong emphasis on science, computing, reading, writing, and the arts. Our facilities include an innovation lab, specialist IT equipment, and programs in sports such as gymnastics, martial arts, basketball, and cricket. Emerging technologies like robotics, AI, machine learning, and VR/AR are integrated to enhance learning, including advanced Arabic provision.

In Secondary and Sixth Form, students benefit from tailored pathways with a wide range of GCSEs, A-levels in subjects like sciences, business, and fine arts, supported by university-linked lectures and industry placements. Advanced tools such as Web3/blockchain, drones, autonomous vehicles, and esports labs prepare students for future careers. Sixth Form further bridges school, university, and industry through global partnerships and cutting-edge technology, ensuring students excel academically while acquiring real-world skills.

The Director of Enrichment will lead and develop the school’s “beyond the classroom” provision, ensuring it aligns with the GEMS School of Research and Innovation’s vision for a holistic, future-focused education. This role involves designing and delivering a high-quality programme of co-curricular activities, trips, service opportunities, and academic enrichment that is engaging, challenging, and values-driven. The Director will play a key role in shaping the Student Digital Portfolio, supporting students in showcasing their achievements and preparing for university and college pathways.

With responsibility for maintaining high standards across all areas of enrichment, the Director will foster a culture of excellence, intellectual curiosity, service, challenge, and wellbeing. They will oversee the development of the Trailblazer curriculum and line manage key coordinators, ensuring strong alignment between enrichment and the academic curriculum to support the development of core skills and values.

The role includes leading the academic enrichment programme, working closely with departments to embed meaningful opportunities beyond the classroom, and collaborating with senior leaders such as the Director of Sport and Director of CAPA. The Director will also support staff recruitment, induction, and professional development, including leading CPD linked to enrichment and establishing consistent planning and quality assurance processes.

In addition, the Director of Enrichment will contribute to innovation across the school by aligning with research, technology, and innovation initiatives, working closely with the Vice Principal to ensure these elements are embedded within the wider enrichment provision.

Skills

Person Specifications:

B.Ed. or bachelor’s degree with PGCE/PGDE (or equivalent)

 Leadership experience at whole-school level Experience managing CCAs and or Activities programmes in schools Strong understanding of safeguarding and risk assessment processes Proven ability to drive sustained staff adoption of agreed platforms Experience delivering staff CPD

Strong strategic planning and operational oversight capability

Experience working with external agencies and providers

 Experience representing a school at regional or international events Experience leading whole-school or multi-school group events Evidence of delivering and evaluating an effective beyond the classroom strategy

Commitment to School Culture:

 Aspiration to contribute to a world-class school with an innovation-driven culture Commitment to high standards of safeguarding and, health and safety Willingness to operate at both strategic and operational levels in a growing institution

All positions attract an excellent remuneration package including: Competitive tax-free salary, individual fully furnished accommodation, free schooling, private medical insurance, annual airfares to country of residence and end of Service Gratuity.

GEMS Teachers also have free access to our loyalty app GEMS rewards www.gemsrewards.com which provides significant savings on day-to-day life in the UAE. We offer thousands of discou

data.title: Head Of SAP Finance Product
data.jd_text:
About us:Soar is a global fintech startup that specializes in financing and investment. Currently headquartered in Saudi Arabia, Soar is growing throughout the region with a mission to help people achieve their financial goals with innovative financial and property investment solutions and tools through its multi-purpose platform, designed to offer a simple and seamless user experience.
About the Role:
We are looking for a visionary Head of SAP Finance Product to bridge the gap between financial strategy and technical execution. In this pivotal role, you will not just "manage" our SAP landscape; you will own it as a Product. You will drive the roadmap for our SAP S/4HANA ecosystem, ensuring it serves as a scalable, automated, and compliant backbone for our rapidly growing Fintech operations in Saudi Arabia.You will lead a cross-functional team to deliver high-velocity financial innovations while ensuring strict adherence to SAMA (Saudi Central Bank) cybersecurity guidelines and ZATCA Phase 2 e-invoicing integrations.
Key Responsibilities
1. Product Strategy & Roadmap OwnershipDefine the Vision: Treat the SAP Finance landscape as an internal product, creating a long-term roadmap that aligns with company goals (e.g., IPO readiness, regional expansion, new product launches).Stakeholder Management: Act as the primary bridge between Finance, Treasury, and Tech, translating complex business requirements into scalable SAP technical solutions.
2. KSA Regulatory & Compliance LeadershipZATCA Integration: Lead the end-to-end technical compliance for ZATCA Phase 2 (Integration Phase), ensuring seamless real-time reporting of e-invoices.Tax & Zakat Automation: Configure and maintain automated workflows for VAT, Withholding Tax, and Zakat to ensure zero-error regulatory reporting.SAMA Compliance: Ensure all SAP financial data processes meet SAMA's strict data sovereignty, audit trail, and cybersecurity standards.
3. Technical Architecture & IntegrationCore Fintech Integration: Architect robust APIs and integration layers between SAP S/4HANA and core Fintech systems (Payment Gateways, Core Banking, Treasury Management).S/4HANA Optimization: Oversee the configuration and health of core modules: FI (GL, AP, AR)Automation First: Drive the adoption of SAP BTP and Fiori to automate reconciliation, bank statement processing, and month-end closing cycles.
4. Team & Vendor ManagementLeadership: Recruit, mentor, and lead a high-performing team of Functional Consultants, ABAP Developers, and Product Owners.Vendor Governance: Manage relationships with SAP System Integrators (SIs) and external partners, ensuring delivery quality and cost efficiency.
Requirements:Education & Certifications
Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science, Finance, or related field.Master's/MBA is strongly preferred.CMA / CPA / ACCA certification is a strong plus (demonstrating financial acumen).SAP Certifications: SAP S/4HANA Finance or SAP Activate Project Manager.
Experience:
10+ Years of total experience in SAP Finance ecosystems.3+ Years in a leadership role (Head of Finance Systems, Product Lead, or Solution Architect).KSA Market Expertise: Proven track record with ZATCA e-invoicing, VAT, and SAMA regulations is non-negotiable.Fintech/Banking Exposure: Experience integrating SAP with banking interfaces (Host-to-Host, SWIFT, SARIE) or high-volume transaction platforms.
Skills & Mindset:
Technical Depth: Hands-on experience with SAP FICO, ABAP concepts, and Fiori Apps.Product Mindset: Ability to prioritize features based on business value rather than just technical requirements.Language: Fluency in English is required; Arabic is highly advantageous for regulatory liaison.

data.title: Deputy Head of Primary
data.jd_text:
Job Description

The deputy Head of Primary, under the direction of the Head of Primary, will take a major role in:

 Embracing and encouraging the ethos and standards of excellence as defined in the GEMS Core Values. To promote and embody the ‘The GFM Way’ so that it is always at the core of school improvement work ensuring children are at the heart of everything we do. Assist in shaping & implementing the school strategic plan, excellence plan and any other school priority improvement initiatives. To contribute to and also provide leadership and management of the staff and students. To ensure a high-quality school experience for all students, securing desired outcomes. To ensure a high-quality customer experience for all parents. Ensuring high academic standards in the school in relation to the schools own desire for all students to be the best they can as well as a commitment to the UAE National Agenda targets. Formulating the aims and objectives of the school and establishing policies for achieving these aims and objectives Managing staff and resources to that end Monitoring progress towards the achievement of the school’s aims and objectives Managing budgets and undertake teaching and other professional duties as reasonably delegated by the Principal.

Duties And Responsibilities

School culture and behaviour 

 Relentlessly uphold The GFM Way Embrace and encourage the ethos and standards of excellence as defined in the GEMS Core Values. Work closely with the Head of School, Primary Leadership Team and Vice Principal to establish effective and globally relevant practices of learning & teaching. Implement the school’s vision for quality in the school linked with the GEMS expectation of excellent education. Create a culture where students experience a positive and enriching school life Uphold educational standards in order to prepare students from all backgrounds for their next phase of education and life Ensure a culture of staff professionalism Encourage high standards of behaviour from students, built on rules and routines that are understood by staff and students and clearly demonstrated by all adults in school Use consistent and fair approaches to managing behaviour, in line with the school’s behaviour policy

Teaching, curriculum and assessment 

 Champion the Teach Like a GEM Champion Instructional Coaching and the use of Steplab Establish and sustain high-quality teaching across all subjects and phases, based on evidence Ensure teaching is underpinned by subject expertise Develop monitoring and evaluation systems to assess teaching and learning standards, and implement any necessary improvement strategies. Ensure the teaching of a broad, structured and coherent curriculum Establish curriculum leadership, including subject leaders with relevant expertise and access to professional networks and communities Use valid, reliable and proportionate approaches to assessing students’ knowledge and understanding of the curriculum

Additional And Special Educational Needs (SEN) And Disabilities

 Promote a culture and practices that enables all students to access the curriculum Have ambitious expectations for all students with SEN and disabilities Make sure the school works effectively with the parents to identify additional needs and provide support and adaptation where appropriate

Organisational management and school improvement 

 Establish and sustain the school’s ethos and strategic direction together with the governing board and through consultation with the school community Establish and oversee systems, processes and policies so the school can operate effectively Ensure staff and students’ safety and welfare through effective approaches to safeguarding, as part of duty of care Manage staff and student wellbeing Ensure rigorous approaches to identifying, managing and mitigating risk Identify problems and barriers to school effectiveness, and develop strategies for school improvement that are realistic, timely and suited to the school’s context Lead on school improvement areas and ensure strategies are effectively monitored, implemented and reviewed

Staff management and Professional development 

 Performance manage Assistant headteachers and middle leaders, including carrying out appraisals and holding staff to account to their performance Ensure staff have access to appropriate, high standard professional development opportunities Keep up to date with developments in education Seek training and continuing professional development to meet needs

Governance, accountability and working in partnership 

 Understand and welcome the role of effective governance, including accepting responsibility Ensure that staff understand their professional responsibilities and are held to account Lead the school effectively and ensure it efficiently operates within the required regulatory frameworks and meets all statutory duties Work successfully with other Founders or Cluster schools and organisations where approp

data.title: VP - Engineering (Exchange)
data.jd_text:
The OpportunityCronos Labs is building the infrastructure to collapse every speculative market into one app. Tokenized stocks, crypto perpetuals, prediction markets, spot: one balance, every market, powered by Crypto.com's 150M+ users and regulated infrastructure for tokenized equities.
We need a VP- Engineering to build the trading engine that makes this possible. The core technical mandate is a hybrid onchain Central Limit Order Book (CLOB) and matching engine with institutional-grade risk infrastructure: cross-asset margin, real-time liquidation systems, and a risk engine that can handle correlated drawdowns across tokenized stocks and crypto derivatives simultaneously. This is the single biggest capability gap on the team. Our blockchain and platform engineering is well-staffed and capable. What we lack is the person who has built centralized, high-performance trading infrastructure and can translate that expertise into a hybrid onchain architecture.
This is a greenfield build. You are not inheriting someone else's architecture. The Sidecar Sequencer (Rust, off-chain) handles order matching at <5ms P50 latency and 100K OPS throughput. The Cronos EVM handles settlement and custody. You will own the full technical stack from matching engine to smart contracts to mobile app, with the team across Smart Contracts, Blockchain, DevOps, Platform, QA, Trading, and Inventory.
The Product You Are BuildingCronos App is a mobile-first trading app that lets users:Trade tokenized stocks (NVDA, TSLA, etc.) 24/7 with increased buying powerTrade crypto perpetuals and spotTrade sports and event outcomes (prediction markets) with the ability to exit earlyUse one balance to collateralize positions across all asset classesChoose between "Simple/Fun Mode" (guardrails, plain language) and "Pro Mode" (advanced execution, lowest fees)The product is powered by Crypto.com's regulated infrastructure for tokenized equities and prediction markets and built on the Cronos blockchain.
What You'll OwnPrimary Mandate: Trading Infrastructure (The Gap)
Hybrid CLOB & Matching Engine. Architect and ship the off-chain Sidecar Sequencer (Rust) with <5ms P50 tick-to-trade latency, 100K OPS throughput, and <1ms latency variance. Integrate with Cronos EVM for onchain settlement (<60s settlement delay). Route between onchain CLOB and offchain RFQ for best execution.Risk Engine & Margin Systems. Build the full risk stack: collateral weighting, cross-asset netting, initial margin checks, dynamic maintenance thresholds. Unified margin where tokenized equities can margin crypto trades and vice versa. Real-time risk calculations across stocks, crypto, and prediction markets.Liquidation Infrastructure. Design and implement the liquidation engine, auto-deleveraging (ADL) system, and insurance fund architecture. These must survive correlated market crashes, not just normal volatility. The insurance fund must be verifiable onchain with clear deployment rules.Perpetuals & Derivatives Engine. Perpetual futures with funding rate mechanisms, leverage management, and position lifecycle. Phase 1 forks the CDC Exchange matching engine; Phase 2 transitions to a fully onchain Global Order Book.Oracle Integration & Market Data. Manipulation-resistant price feeds for liquidation triggers, mark price computation, and cross-market reference pricing.
Secondary Mandate: Platform & Blockchain Smart Contract & Blockchain Infrastructure. Cronos chain upgrades, USDC migration (IOU to native stablecoin), bridge and cross-chain infrastructure, smart contract security and audit pipeline. Vault, Clearing House, Insurance Fund, and Governance contracts.Platform & Mobile Engineering. Mobile-first consumer app for emerging markets. Embedded wallet with passkey-based authentication. Account abstraction and TEE/verifiable compute for signing. API Gateway and SDK.DevOps & QA. CI/CD, infrastructure reliability, automated testing, performance benchmarking.CDC Integration & Coordination. Coordinate with the Crypto.com tokenization team on shared Confluence/documentation workflows and align timelines across organizations.
What We're Looking ForRequiredDeep trading infrastructure and risk management experience. You have built matching engines, margin systems, liquidation engines, or real-time risk platforms. You understand order matching semantics, cross-collateralization models, and how liquidation cascades propagate under stress. This experience can come from tier-1 investment banks, hedge funds, prop shops, centralized crypto exchanges, or DeFi derivatives protocols.Derivatives market structure fluency. Perpetuals, options, funding rates, mark price computation, portfolio margin. You don't just understand the theory. You've built systems that handle these instruments at production scale.Hands-on blockchain/DeFi depth or proven ability to ramp fast. EVM smart contracts (Solidity), protocol design, bridge security, token standards. If you're crossing over from TradFi, you need to demonstra

data.title: Systems & Service Operations Director – Controls
data.jd_text:
What You Will Do

The Systems & Service Operations Director for Controls is accountable for operational governance and execution excellence across the Controls Order-to-Cash lifecycle. This role ensures disciplined Percentage of Completion management, predictable backlog-to-invoice conversion, and strong system governance across countries and Controls domains. The position establishes standard work through robust SOPs and provides functional leadership to country and domain systems leaders to ensure consistency, compliance, and cash velocity. The role also defines SOP and governance for pre sales and after sales engineering for EMEA.

Key Responsibilities

How you will do it:

Controls Service Order-to-Cash Governance

Own end-to-end governance of the Controls Order-to-Cash process from order release through execution, revenue recognition, invoicing, and cash realization.Ensure Controls projects are executed in line with contractual milestones, system readiness, and commercial commitments.Act as the single operational authority connecting project execution systems, finance processes, and service delivery.

Percentage of Completion Management

Establish and govern a standardized Percentage of Completion framework for Controls service projects.Ensure accurate progress measurement tied to physical completion, system commissioning, and cost consumption.Drive consistent application of POC rules across countries to eliminate revenue volatility and late recognition.Partner with Finance to ensure compliance with accounting standards and internal controls.

Service Systems Leadership & Country Governance

Provide functional leadership and governance to Country and Domain Controls Service Systems Leaders.Define operating rhythms, review cadences, and escalation paths for system execution risks.Ensure consistent system usage and data quality across Controls service platforms.

Standard Operating Procedures & Standard Work

Design, deploy, and maintain structured SOPs covering all critical Controls service workflows including:Order handoff from Projects to ServiceProgress updates and POC validationChange order and variation handlingInvoicing readiness and releaseDrive adoption of standard work to reduce execution variability across countries and service teams.
Backlog Health & Invoicing Conversion

Monitor Controls service backlog health including aging, stalled projects, and unbilled value.Identify root causes preventing backlog conversion such as system gaps, milestone misalignment, or execution delays.Lead corrective actions to improve invoice timeliness and backlog burn rate.Ensure invoicing reflects true execution status and contractual terms.

Performance Management & Continuous Improvement

Define and track key Controls service KPIs including:POC accuracy and forecast reliabilityBacklog aging and conversion rateInvoice cycle timeRevenue leakage and reworkLead structured problem-solving to address systemic execution issues.Drive continuous improvement using lean, standard work, and operational excellence principles.
Cross-Functional Alignment

Work closely with Controls Service Operations, Project Management, Finance, IT, and Commercial teams.Ensure execution systems support scalable Controls growth and digital service expansion.Align operational processes with customer delivery expectations and long-term service lifecycle objectives.

What We Look For

Senior leadership experience in operations, project operations, or systems governance within a global, multi-country environment.Strong understanding of project execution, commissioning workflows, and service lifecycle management.Deep expertise in Order-to-Cash processes and Percentage of Completion Accounting.Proven ability to design and enforce SOPs and standard work at scale.Strong influencing skills in matrix organizations with indirect leadership accountability.Highly analytical, data-driven, and execution-focused leadership style.

data.title: Associate Director, Funds & Fiduciary Services Operations
data.jd_text:
Job Summary

The role holder is accountable for end-to-end delivery of funds & fiduciary services operations across UAE/DIFC and has responsibility of the operational risk and controls. This includes monitoring the performance of operations through key metrics such as volumes, productivity, accuracy, service levels, losses and lapses, issues and risk registers. Collectively responsible and accountable for setting a governance of infrastructure processes and frameworks for robust compliance and controls.

Strategy

 Awareness and understanding of the Group’s business strategy and model appropriate to the role. Identify opportunities for business growth and development, working closely with management to drive new initiatives. Critical success factors include the ability to work with stakeholders within and outside the bank, a good business understanding, an expert appreciation of Fund service and a pro-active attitude in managing key risks. Ensure processes performed either onshore or offshore meet the minimum standards and meet or exceed client expectations/ SLA’s which includes Direct MENA countries as well as other SCB countries hubbing into AME Hubs To align services across hubs ensuring a standardized and effective service model translating into elevated client satisfaction Clearly define and manage the different client groupings (direct/ internal/ group/ regional) whilst ensuring end client satisfaction and SLA adherence/ improvement. Monitor and manage service levels with other non-AME SCB hubs. Work closely with the SCB Network Team to monitor service levels with third party agents. To understand, help implement and ensure compliance with country and global Regulatory requirements. To work closely with business heads to ensure that the services delivered by various operational platforms are of top quality and that client needs are being attended to according to our service level agreements. To ensure that key business practices and service delivery processes are conducted in compliance with Group and country regulatory guidelines and those risks are identified and managed.

Key Responsibilities

Business

 This role requires a high level of expertise in the full fund services product suite. In addition to local Fund accounting the individual will require industry knowledge. Work closely with internal teams and external stakeholders to ensure the effective and efficient delivery of daily NAV. Support the team in the day-to-day operational activities as required for the smooth running of the operations. Ensuring compliance with all Group and Country policies, Code of Conduct and consistency in execution, and to ensure that statutory regulations and laws as a corporate body are met and satisfied. Ensure day to day operating compliance with all relevant local and global regulatory requirements and industry best practice. Management of Risk effectively, including identification, communication, and remediation of risks to the relevant forums Support business by participating in client RFPs / DDQs / DDVs Fair Accountability – full remediation/root cause analysis and execution on failed audits & ops losses

Processes

Accountability: Fund Services client onboarding

 Work closely with client/sales/product in finalizing the PPM/FASA and SLM Liaising with the implementation/Sales team on the onboarding of new Fund service clients On-boarding of Fund Service clients in SeCCure and in Multifonds via the hub (GBS MY) Communicate with Data Management team and GBS MY on any new onboarding of funds. Communicate with Data Management team and GBS MY any new instruments bought into the fund.

Skills And Experience

 Fund Accounting Understanding, and Industry knowledge Delivering results and meeting customer expectations Service Delivery & Operations Manage Risk / Conduct Business Facilitation Manage Change Business Governance & Support

Qualifications

Market Knowledge

 Awareness and understanding of the wider business, economic and market environment in which the firm operates. Understanding of Fiduciary and Fund Services processes and key associated market risks Proven track record to quickly get up to speed on new areas, concepts, and products.

Business Strategy and Model

 Awareness and understanding of the firm’s business strategy and model appropriate to the role. Track record in delivering continuous improvement.

Risk Management and Control

 The ability to identify, assess, monitor, control and mitigate risks to the firm. Also, an awareness and understanding of the main risks facing the firm and the role the individual plays in managing them.

Financial Analysis and Control

 The ability to interpret the firm’s financial information, identify key issues based on this information and put in place appropriate controls and measures.

Governance, Oversight and Controls

 The ability to assess the effectiveness of the firm’s arrangements to deliver effective governance, oversight, and controls in the business an

We create and operate intelligent infrastructures and buildings that respond to the climate emergency and contribute to more balanced, sustainable and resilient territorial development. Operating in 100 countries, Egis puts the expertise of its 19,500 employees at the service of its clients and develops cutting-edge innovations accessible to all projects. Through its wide range of activities, Egis is a key player in the collective organisation of society and the living environment of citizens all over the world. With 3,500 employees across 8 countries in the Middle East, Egis has delivered over 700 complex development projects, stimulating economic growth and enhancing quality of life. Ranked among the top ten firms in the Middle East by Engineering News Record (ENR), Egis is committed to sustainable development. The Group’s operations in the Middle East are built on strategic acquisitions and a deep understanding of local market conditions. Egis’ long history of providing comprehensive engineering, consulting, and project management services makes it a trusted partner for regional governments, investors, and developers. Participate in high-level coordination meetings with authorities and key stakeholders. Represent the project at executive and institutional levels. Proven experience in high-speed rail or major railway projects. Demonstrated experience delivering projects under Design & Build contracts. Prior experience in the Middle East is highly desirable. data.title: Associate Project Director
data.jd_text:
Job Description

UNS Dubai is looking for an Associate Project Director to lead the delivery of complex architecture and design projects across the region (UAE and KSA). This role combines project leadership, client management, commercial awareness, and team guidance.

The Associate Project Director is expected to oversee projects from early design through delivery, maintain strong relationships with clients and consultants, and support high-quality outcomes that reflect UNS’s design standards and strategic goals.

This is a senior role for someone who can move confidently between design intent, project delivery, business priorities, and team leadership.

Responsibilities

Project and Design Leadership

Lead and manage large-scale, high-profile architectural projects from inception to completion.Maintain technical design quality, executing extensive drawing/document reviews with a dedicated team.Mentor and instruct team members on design requirements, schedules, cost estimates, and more.Ensure compliance with project standards and quality management (QA/QC), meeting technical quality, reliability, schedule, and cost requirements.Prepare and execute Project Management Plans, including Work Plans, Risk Management Plans, Safety Plans, Quality Plans, and Communications Plans.Define and verify project scope with clients, monitoring and controlling changes throughout the project lifecycle.Coordinate multidisciplinary teams across design, engineering, and construction.

Operational, Programme, Planning, and Budget Management

Prepare and manage complex project programs and contracts.Manage project budgets, resources, and timelines to meet commercial outcomes.Ensure contract terms are followed and manage scope changes effectively.Oversee financial and operational strategies to ensure project success.Actively lead project planning, resourcing, staffing, supply, and subcontract management.Review engineering, construction, and procurement schedules to ensure compliance with project plans.Prepare monthly project reports and contribute to stakeholder reporting.

Client Relationships & Business Development

Represent UNS in communications with clients, sub-contractors, and joint venture partners.Elevate UNS by differentiating our work, technology, and client experience.Lead business development efforts, including proposal preparation and client presentations.Build mutually beneficial internal and external client relationships.Foster an inclusive, high-performance culture based on respect and support.

Supervision (if in construction stage)

Lead the project supervision team to ensure the supervision scope is fully executed, deliverables are submitted on schedule, and client expectations are met.

Job Requirements

What We Are Looking For

We are looking for someone who combines leadership presence with strong delivery experience and sound judgement. The ideal candidate is confident managing complexity, comfortable engaging with senior stakeholders, and able to guide teams toward high-quality outcomes.

Requirements

Holds a Bachelor’s degree in preferably Architecture, Civil Engineering, or otherwise a related engineering discipline from a recognized university (degree must be legally attested for UAE use).Has minimum 15 years of relevant professional experience in architectural / engineering consultancy.Demonstrated experience in leading Lead Design Consultancy (LDC) roles, managing the full design process across disciplines, and coordinating internal teams, external consultants, clients, and key project stakeholders to ensure alignment, quality delivery, and adherence to programme and commercial objectives. Has membership with the UAE Society of Engineers (SOE).Has registration with Dubai Municipality as a practicing engineer. Has passed the Dubai Municipality technical competency examination, if required.Be willing to be formally registered under our Dubai entity as a technical engineer responsible for consultancy activities.Have experience leading multidisciplinary design teams and complex projects, consistent with an Associate Project Director role.Professional fluency in English.

Preferred Experience

Experience working on complex regional projects.Familiarity with local approval processes and delivery frameworks in Dubai and the wider UAE.Experience contributing to bids, proposals, or strategic client development.Confidence operating in a senior leadership role within a design practice.

Why UNS?

UNS Dubai works across ambitious architecture and design projects in the region, combining strong design thinking with technical rigour and delivery expertise. The studio values collaboration, clarity, and a forward-looking approach to the built environment.

Apply Today

Elevate your career with UNS. Apply now and join a team that's reshaping the future of architecture and design.

Job Title: Project Director – Entertainment DevelopmentLocation: Dubai, UAEClient: Leading Entertainment DeveloperSalary: AED 55,000 + Package
OverviewWe are seeking a highly experienced Project Director to lead the delivery of major entertainment, leisure, and attraction developments in Dubai. This is a client-side leadership role responsible for overseeing complex projects from early concept through to full delivery and operational handover.
Key ResponsibilitiesLead the full lifecycle of projects from concept, feasibility, and creative development through design, procurement, construction, testing & commissioning, and handoverAct as the senior client representative across all stakeholders including creative agencies, consultants, contractors, operators, and IP partnersEnsure alignment between creative vision, technical execution, and operational readinessDevelop and manage project plans, budgets, governance frameworks, and KPIsOversee delivery of complex entertainment components including ride systems, show production, AV/SFX, and themingDrive stakeholder coordination across internal departments including operations, finance, legal, and strategyLead risk management, change control, and dispute resolution at an executive levelEnsure compliance with UAE regulations, safety standards, and licensing requirements
Key Requirements15–20 years of experience in project/program managementMinimum 8–10 years delivering entertainment, attractions, or large-scale leisure developmentsStrong client-side experience, ideally within UAE or GCCProven track record delivering complex, multi-stakeholder projects from inception to completionExperience managing creative, technical, and operational integrationStrong commercial understanding including procurement, contracts, and project economicsPMP, RICS, or similar certifications are advantageous
Key CompetenciesEntertainment project leadershipStakeholder and partner managementCreative and technical integrationOperational readiness and commissioningRisk management and problem solvingExecutive communication and leadership
OpportunityThis is a unique opportunity to lead the delivery of high-profile, world-class entertainment assets within a major developer, playing a key role in shaping guest experiences at scale.
For a confidential discussion, please apply.

data.title: Project Director
data.jd_text:
At AKQA (part of WPP), we believe in the imaginative application of art and science to create beautiful ideas, products and services. With an entrepreneurial and collaborative approach, we design adaptive digital services and applications that capture the imagination, delivering impressive returns for our clients.

The Delivery team are at the epicentre of all projects, ensuring they’re delivered to the highest quality, on time, and that clients receive the greatest possible value from their investment

From our location in Dubai, AKQA offers our staff the opportunity to produce meaningful and award-winning work for world-class clients and brands. You will work in an environment which fosters a meritocratic culture and encourages ownership, you’ll be liaising with bright minds across KSA, UAE and Egypt. You’ll have the opportunity to learn and grow within a creative and innovative. team, with access to ongoing personal and professional development. At AKQA, we’re committed to your career growth, as well as your work/life balance.

As a Project Director at AKQA, you will be responsible for the overall direction and management of projects exceeding £1.5m, either independently or through designated Project Managers where appropriate. You will ensure consistency with corporate strategy, processes and client satisfaction. These projects should be delivered on time, on budget, to a high level of quality but importantly to achieve the established project success criteria and exceed client expectations.

Role Requirements

Responsible for the successful delivery of highly complex projects with revenue typically in excess of £1.5m across large-scale project or multiple projectsAnalyses and understands the project and its context within the client's business and how expected benefits can be enabled (indirect, direct, financial and non-financial.Structure projects appropriately from the outset, selecting the best tools and processes to meet the project, team and client requirements.Identify project risks and issues, ensuring effective mitigation and risk strategies are implemented.Estimate and prepare strong proposals. Track and report financial status of projects against an agreed budget, using burn reports to monitor and proactively mitigate potential overruns, highlighting clearly to the Executive Delivery Director when an overrun is likely to occur.Identify and successfully manage multiple suppliers, partners and senior clients expected to be at C level to ensure the best outcome for both clients and AKQA. Keep stakeholders informed of project progress at all times and manage expectations proactively. Work with Client Leads on delivering high scoring client satisfaction. Develop positive senior level relationships both internally and externally.Take an active role in new business pitches.Varying project methodologies along with their pros and cons. Able to strike a balance between pragmatic project delivery practices and by-the-book, ‘ideal scenario’ delivery.Support the Executive Delivery Director in the recruitment, retention, review, motivation, training and mentoring of the Delivery team. Develop and deliver internal training courses. Contribute to the improvement of processes.

QUALITIES AND CHARACTERISTICS

Project management experience within the digital/creative industry.Experience of project managing custom-designed, highly-complex full life-cycle projects in excess of £1.5m.Delivery of distributed development projects across multiple geographies is advantageous.Strong knowledge and best practice approach for project management.Experience of having adapted the delivery process around those required by a client.Enough knowledge of SCRUM, DSDM, Kanban and Lean to have a debate with clients as to their merits and drawbacks.Exceptional client management skills.Strong organisational and planning skills.Excellent communication skills across all mediums – presentation, verbal, written; gaining the confidence of the business; credible and experienced at operating at C level.Ability to build excellent relationships with peers and business counterparts, and the ability to achieve results under potentially difficult circumstances. Negotiates well, listens actively and makes compelling points.Experience of mentoring and coaching.Displays creative approach to problem-solving and project management in general.Demonstrates excellent levels of quality and attention to detail.Ability to make sound commercial and financial decisions, quickly understand problems, propose solutions and manage customer situations.Ability to work well under pressure and to have an objective focused and positive approach, and be comfortable working independently, be self-motivated and self-driven.Strong customer service ethos, a commitment to quality and the will to constantly drive improvements. Commitment to high standards of excellence and integrity.Possess good business acumen and sound judgement. Be entrepreneurial, with a collaborative, s

data.title: Director of Project Execution
data.jd_text:
Together we make the difference

We are a leading provider of innovative and high-performance solutions for airport logistics. Our portfolio includes products and solutions for baggage and cargo handling, high-end software for the digitalization of logistics processes as well as an extensive range of maintenance and services. Major customers include renowned airports and airlines around the globe.

We are looking for an experienced Director of Project Execution who will report directly to the Executive Management and oversee multiple airport BHS and MHS projects. You will provide guidance and leadership to the Project Execution and Site Management teams, foster collaboration across internal functions and external stakeholders, and ensure projects are delivered safely, on-time, on-budget, contract compliant, and to the required quality through to handover.

What are my responsibilities?

Lead end-to-end delivery of airport BHS/MHS programs, ensuring safe, on-budget, contract-compliant execution.Serve as senior client and stakeholder lead, aligning airport authorities/operators, consultants/PMCs, contractors, and internal teams.Own the full lifecycle from engineering coordination through installation, integration, testing, commissioning, ORAT, and handover to Service.Drive strong project governance (steerco, reviews, workshops), ensuring clear decisions, actions, and follow-up.Manage portfolio performance across multi-site/multi-country matrix teams; control KPIs, risk, change, and escalations, including recovery/turnaround.Ensure effective site execution in live airport environments, including M&E installation, upgrades, brownfield works, and system interface management.Ensure completeness and quality of technical/contract documentation and reporting across the project lifecycle.Lead successful handovers to Life-Cycle Services, ensuring continuity, training, spares, warranty transition, and sign-off.Support Sales & Bid activities to develop opportunities and ensure executable delivery strategies and resourcing inputs.Build and lead high-performing teams through coaching, accountability, and continuous improvement.

What do I need to qualify for the role?

10+ years delivering complex engineering/automation/site projects; strong ownership of cost, schedule, quality, and safety.Proven leadership in multi-stakeholder environments with strong client-facing and executive communication capability.Strong experience in airport BHS or MHS systems including site execution and commissioning; ORAT exposure is a plus.Solid understanding of automation integration environments (mechanical/electrical, PLC/SCADA/controls, interfaces).Strong commercial and contractual discipline: change control, risk/opportunity management, claims awareness.Proficient in project tools (e.g., MS Project/Primavera, MS Office; Jira/Confluence is a plus).Willingness to travel and operate in dynamic airport environments.Fluent in English; additional languages are a plus.

data.title: Head of Transformation and Strategy
data.jd_text:
We have partnered with a large, diversified UAE-based conglomerate to appoint a Head of Transformation. This is a Group-level leadership role responsible for designing and driving a coordinated business transformation agenda across a complex, multi-sector organisation. Reporting directly to the Group CEO, this is a rare opportunity to shape how a major conglomerate evolves its operating model, organisational structure and commercial performance at scale.
This role is for someone who has led large, complex business transformation programmes from strategy through to execution, not IT or digital change, but genuine enterprise-wide transformation spanning people, process, structure and culture. You will be a credible, senior voice in the room, capable of influencing at the highest levels while maintaining hands-on accountability for delivery.
About the role:Define and lead the Group's business transformation strategy, ensuring alignment with the overall vision and priorities of Group leadershipIdentify and drive transformation opportunities across business units, including operating model redesign, organisational effectiveness, process improvement and commercial performanceBuild and lead a high-performing transformation function, embedding structured programme delivery and change management disciplines across the GroupOwn the transformation portfolio from business case through to benefits realisation, maintaining clear accountability and pace throughoutAct as a trusted advisor to the Group CEO, COO and Board, providing transparent visibility on progress, risks and outcomesPartner with business unit CEOs and functional leaders to build transformation capability and drive sustained adoption of changeEstablish governance frameworks and reporting mechanisms that give leadership confidence in the execution of the transformation agendaDrive a performance culture within the transformation function, setting high standards for rigour, commercial thinking and delivery quality
 About you:15+ years of progressive experience leading business transformation within large, complex, multi-business-unit organisations or a minimum of 3 years as a Principal or Senior Engagement Manager at a Tier 1 management consultancy with direct accountability on large-scale business transformation mandatesProven track record of delivering enterprise-wide transformation programmes spanning operating model change, organisational redesign and performance improvementDeep understanding of the structural and operational dynamics of diversified conglomerates, including navigating matrix environments, multiple P&Ls and competing stakeholder agendasStrong commercial acumen with the ability to connect transformation activity to tangible business outcomes and financial value

data.title: Founding Head of the Investor Club
data.jd_text:
About Us

The DM Capital Council is a new, private, members-only club for sophisticated investors, entrepreneurs, and builders looking to access and invest in the next generation of category-defining companies. We are not a typical angel group. We are a community-first organization built on the principles of deep diligence, collaborative learning, and exclusive access.

Our unfair advantage is our origin. We are launching from within the Decentralized Masters ecosystem, giving us a built-in, high-trust audience of 4500 of the smartest minds in the space. Our mission is to build the most engaged and, respected and high-performing private investor community in our niche, and we are looking for a world-class leader to build it with us.

The Role: Founding Head of the Club

This is a CEO-level role for a new venture. You are not joining a team; you are building one. You will be the public face, the chief architect, and the operational engine of the entire club. Your mission: transform this concept into a vibrant, profitable, and self-sustaining business in 90 days.

What You Will Do:

Be the Face of the Brand:

Host all events, lead member communications, and represent the club publicly with charisma and authorityServe as the primary spokesperson, shaping the club's voice and narrative across media, online, and live events

Architect the Community:

Design and execute the entire member journey, from onboarding to daily engagement, with a goal of achieving +70 NPSImplement frameworks that foster meaningful interaction, retention, and community-driven growth

Drive Growth:

Leverage the Decentralized Masters ecosystem to acquire the first 50 members in 90 days and design a scalable growth engine for the futureEstablish clear metrics and systems to monitor engagement, conversion, and retention

Run the Investment Engine:

Build and manage a high-quality deal flow pipeline, including sourcing, screening, due diligence, and presenting opportunities to membersPartner with founders and co-investors to secure exclusive investment opportunities

Own the Business:

Manage the P&L, oversee tech stack selection and implementation, and run day-to-day operations with extreme ownership and operational disciplineDevelop processes, reporting, and dashboards to ensure accountability and measurable outcomes

Requirements

Who You Are:

A Proven Builder: You have 5-7+ years of experience and a track record of building something exceptional from scratch - a company, a community, a major productA Community Native: You have direct experience building and scaling a paid community. You understand the art and science of belongingA Public Presence: You are a compelling communicator who is comfortable on stage, on camera, and in the spotlightOperationally Excellent: You turn chaos into systems. You are a master of process, prioritization, automation, and getting things doneDI (Dominance-Influence) Personality: You are a natural leader who can command a room (Influence) and has the relentless drive to execute and achieve results (Dominance)

Benefits

Why This Role is a Unique Opportunity:

Build Your Legacy: This is a chance to build a category-defining company from the ground up, with your vision at the centerUnfair Advantage: You are not starting from zero. You have a built-in distribution channel of thousands of engaged, high-trust members from Day 1Significant Upside: You will receive a competitive base salary, a performance bonus tied to growth, and an equity/carry package that gives you a direct stake in the club's success

If you are a builder who is ready to step up and lead, we want to hear from you.

data.title: Director of Learning, 2 Hour Learning (Remote) - $200,000/year USD
data.jd_text:
Are you prepared to harness AI's transformative power to redefine what students can achieve?

At 2 Hour Learning, AI is not an add-on—it is woven into the fabric of everything we do. We have rebuilt the learning experience from first principles, integrating breakthroughs in AI and learning science to transcend the limitations of the conventional school day. The outcome? Students who exceed expectations decisively.

Our results speak for themselves: students on our platform routinely earn 4s and 5s on five or more AP exams, post gains exceeding two years on annual MAP assessments, and surpass their own assumptions of what they can accomplish. If the prospect of delivering transformative outcomes at scale energizes you, 2 Hour Learning is your destination.

You will function as the principal designer of our groundbreaking learning ecosystem for your assigned school model, spanning multiple campuses. Driven by a relentless focus on student success, you will leverage AI's unlimited capabilities to design hyper-personalized learning pathways tailored to each student's distinct needs, interests, and goals.

Your position will marry data-driven strategy with direct engagement. You will analyze learning data in depth, extracting critical insights to accelerate growth. Yet you will not remain at a distance—you will work on the ground with students, understanding their journeys, obstacles, and victories firsthand. This direct experience will prove essential as you identify the precise motivational triggers and instructional tactics needed to eliminate achievement barriers across all campuses.

You will lead a talented team of learning engineers, data scientists, and instructional innovators to execute your vision. More critically, you will advocate tirelessly for our students, ensuring every decision, innovation, and strategy centers squarely on enhancing their learning outcomes.

This represents a rare opportunity to deploy AI in education and fundamentally reshape the boundaries of the possible. Equipped with advanced learning analytics, the capacity to test pedagogical theories at scale, and organizational support to challenge conventions, you will pioneer new approaches daily.

Your scope is expansive, your resources exceptional, and your mission vital. At 2 Hour Learning, we are not simply using AI to elevate test scores—we are unleashing human potential in full, without reliance on traditional classroom teachers.

If you are ready to apply the most transformative technology of our era to the most fundamental pillar of society, this is your opportunity. Bold vision, disciplined execution, and unwavering dedication to student results are essential. Those committed to preserving the status quo should not apply.

Join us at the forefront of the AI revolution in education. Together, we will not merely anticipate the future of learning—we will build it.

For additional information on 2 Hour Learning, visit our website [https://2hourlearning.com/] and the Future of Education Instagram page [https://www.instagram.com/futureof_education/]. To see a school built around 2 Hour Learning, check out Alpha [https://alpha.school/].

What You Will Be Doing

Designing and iterating on an AI-powered learning ecosystem that demonstrably surpasses traditional education, validated by measurable improvements in student performance metricsInteracting directly with students via virtual channels to comprehend their learning journeys, obstacles, and achievements, translating these insights into continuous ecosystem refinementExtracting actionable intelligence from learning platform data and crafting high-impact academic interventions grounded in AI/ML, learning science, and motivational researchFostering a culture of rigorous experimentation and evidence-driven decision-making, using data to catalyze transformative gains in student growth trajectoriesCollaborating with platform engineering, data science, and design teams to convert academic insights and student input into effective product improvements

What You Won’t Be Doing

Wrapping traditional instruction in an AI veneer. This is not about digitizing classroom teaching—we are reimagining learning entirely from foundational principles.Working with data in a vacuum. Regular engagement with K-12 students is expected, with their feedback treated as critical input from our customers.Deferring to consensus before challenging norms. You will advance a bold vision and mobilize support through data-validated results.Adhering to established methods. You will have latitude to explore novel strategies for motivation, assessment, and pedagogy.Viewing AI as a threat to education. Here, you will embrace AI as a powerful instrument for revolutionizing learning.

Director Of Learning Key Responsibilities

Lead innovation in AI-enabled, teacher-less education to produce outstanding student outcomes across multiple campuses. Integrate data analytics with ongoing student interaction to continually refi

data.title: Interior Design Director
data.jd_text:
About the RoleWe are seeking an experienced and visionary Interior Design Director to lead the creative direction, design strategy, and execution of interior spaces across our portfolio of residential, commercial, retail, and hospitality developments.This role will be instrumental in shaping the design identity of our projects, ensuring that all interiors reflect innovation, functionality, and the highest standards of quality aligned with Arada’s brand vision.
Key ResponsibilitiesDesign Leadership & StrategyLead the interior design vision across multiple large-scale developments.Define and implement design standards, guidelines, and best practices.Ensure alignment of all interior concepts with brand positioning and project objectives.Project Oversight & DeliveryOversee the full lifecycle of interior design projects from concept to completion.Review and approve design packages, drawings, material selections, and FF&E.Collaborate closely with architecture, development, and construction teams to ensure seamless execution.Stakeholder & Consultant ManagementManage and guide external design consultants, ensuring design intent and quality are maintained.Act as the key point of contact for all interior design-related matters across projects.Present design concepts and updates to senior leadership and key stakeholders.Quality Control & InnovationEnsure all interior spaces meet the highest standards of design excellence, functionality, and sustainability.Stay abreast of global design trends, materials, and technologies, integrating innovative solutions into projects.Budget & Commercial AwarenessWork closely with commercial and procurement teams to ensure design solutions are cost-effective without compromising quality.Monitor budgets related to interior design and FF&E selections.Team LeadershipBuild, mentor, and lead a high-performing interior design team.Foster a culture of creativity, collaboration, and accountability.
Key RequirementsBachelor’s or Master’s degree in Interior Design, Architecture, or related field.12–18+ years of experience in interior design, with at least 5+ years in a leadership role.Proven experience delivering large-scale real estate developments (residential, mixed-use, hospitality).Strong portfolio demonstrating high-end, design-led projects.Deep understanding of FF&E, materials, and global design standards.Excellent stakeholder management and presentation skills.Strong commercial awareness with the ability to balance creativity and cost efficiency.Experience in the UAE or GCC market is highly preferred.

Job Summary : The role is a senior leadership role that focuses on driving digital transformation, developing technology-driven products, and enhance commercial value through digital channels. The role will spearhead the digital transformation of products, driving adoption of digital platforms, automating processes, and enhancing customer experience (user journey) to increase revenue and operational efficiency. Key Responsibilities Strategic Leadership: Develop and implement a digital strategy for trade solutions that aligns with organizational goals and market trends. Product Management & Commercialization: Lead the development, launch, and enhancement of digital trade channels, such as Port Community Systems (PCS), Supply Chain Finance platforms, and digital customs systems. Onboarding & Client Services: Manage the onboarding of clients and counterparties to digital platforms, driving adoption rates and ensuring a seamless user experience. Digital Transformation: Lead cross-functional initiatives to move from manual/paper-based trade processes to digital solutions (e.g., e-bills of lading). Operational Risk & Governance: Ensure all digital solutions are compliant with regulatory standards and internal risk frameworks, including KYC/AML in digital onboarding. Vendor & Stakeholder Management: Coordinate with external technology partners, consultants, and internal departments (IT, Sales, Legal, Operations) to implement solutions. Data Analysis & Performance Monitoring: Utilize dashboards and data insights to track transaction volumes, system performance, and ROI of digital platforms. Required Experience & Qualifications Education: A Bachelor's or Master’s degree in Business, Finance, Information Technology, or a related field. Experience: 7+ years of experience in trade finance, banking, or logistics technology, with proven success in leading digital product launches. Digital Literacy: Deep understanding of trade finance technologies (e.g., SWIFT, blockchain), FinTech solutions, and digital banking platforms. Leadership Skills: Proven ability to manage teams, influence stakeholders, and drive projects in a fast-paced environment.
